title: Photoemission Study of the Electronic Structure of Valence Band Convergent SnSe

title: Observation of non-trivial topological electronic structure of orthorhombic SnSe
why: 同步辐射 ARPES + 计算，适合测试 beamline、能带、拓扑术语抽取。

title: Observation of quasi-steady dark excitons and gap phase in a doped semiconductor
why: SnSe2 掺杂半导体 ARPES 案例，适合测试掺杂、gap phase、光照条件字段。
SnSe has published ARPES/topological or band-structure papers and is a good first parser test.
